name: io.github.bighippoman/intercept-mcp
title: Intercept
description: Give your AI the ability to read the web. Fetches URLs as clean markdown with multi-tier fallback.

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Brave Search API key for the search tool (free tier: 2,000 queries/month). Not needed for the fetch tool.
